0.q: overexpression VpSBP16 in A. thaliana enhances tolerance of salt and drought stress... by regulating SOS and ROS signaling cascades.

1.q: We observed that leaves of the transgenic lines accumulated much lower levels of O2− or H2O2 than those of WT plants.

2.q: SA and ethylene induced an increase of VpWRKY3 expression... suggesting that VpWRKY3 was regulated by SA and ethylene.

3.q: VpWRKY3 transgenic tobacco increased the susceptibility to hormone ABA... VpWRKY3 is also involved in abscisic acid signal pathway and salt stress.
